title: Moses App Catalog Version Entry
description: Per-version file at apps/<category>/<subcategory>/<slug>/versions/<tag>.yaml. The filename literally equals the `tag` field. Tag + commit SHA together pin the exact source state Moses will build from.

tag.description: Literal git tag in the upstream repo. Include the leading 'v' if upstream uses it (e.g. 'v1.2.3'); use bare semver if upstream does not. The per-version filename MUST equal this string with a `.yaml` suffix.

commit.description: 40-character lowercase hex SHA that the upstream tag resolves to. Load-bearing pin: the validator clones the source repo at the declared tag and rejects the listing if `git rev-parse <tag>` does not match this value.

releasedAt.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the release. Both UTC 'Z' suffix and explicit offsets are accepted.

mosesMinVersion.description: Minimum Moses platform version this app requires (semver).

yanked.description: Set to true to mark this version as withdrawn. Moses instances will stop offering it for new installs.

yankedReason.description: Required when yanked=true. One- or two-sentence explanation visible to instance operators on sync.
